dependencies.description: The PyPA recommended tool for installing Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-pip

dependencies.description:
PyQt is a set of Python v2 and v3 bindings for The Qt Company's Qt
application framework and runs on all platforms supported by Qt
including Windows, OS X, Linux, iOS and Android. PyQt4 supports Qt v4
and will build against Qt v5.
dependencies.name: py-pyqt4

dependencies.description:
PyQt is a set of Python v2 and v3 bindings for The Qt Company's Qt
application framework and runs on all platforms supported by Qt
including Windows, OS X, Linux, iOS and Android. PyQt5 supports Qt v5.
dependencies.name: py-pyqt5

dependencies.description:
A Python utility that aids in the process of downloading, building,
upgrading, installing, and uninstalling Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-setuptools

dependencies.description: A Spack managed Python virtual environment
dependencies.name: python-venv

dependent_to.description:
A generalist algorithm for cell and nucleus segmentation that can be
optimized for your own data
dependent_to.name: cellpose

dependent_to.description:
app-model is a generic application schema implemented in python, for
declarative organization of application data, such as menus,
keybindings, actions/commands, etc...
dependent_to.name: py-app-model

dependent_to.description:
magicgui is a python library for building graphical user interfaces
(GUIs). It aims to speed up data workflows by providing a simple,
consistent API for creating GUIs to control various data types, that
work across various environments.
dependent_to.name: py-magicgui

dependent_to.description:
napari is a fast, interactive, multi-dimensional image viewer for
Python. It's designed for browsing, annotating, and analyzing large
multi-dimensional images. It's built on top of Qt (for the GUI), vispy
(for performant GPU-based rendering), and the scientific Python stack
(numpy, scipy).
dependent_to.name: py-napari

dependent_to.description: This napari plugin adds a console to napari
dependent_to.name: py-napari-console

dependent_to.description:
The napari plugin manager provides a graphical user interface for
installing napari plugins.
dependent_to.name: py-napari-plugin-manager

dependent_to.description: FontAwesome icons in PyQt and PySide applications
dependent_to.name: py-qtawesome

dependent_to.description: Missing widgets and components for PyQt/PySide
dependent_to.name: py-superqt

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system
